description_long: This is a two-story rectangular house with a flat green roof and exterior walls clad in reddish-brown brick. The front facade features large horizontal windows on both floors, with a central entryway and a covered carport or porch area supported by slender columns. The ground in front of the house is covered by a bold, geometric black-and-white patterned surface, possibly representing a driveway or patio. The side and rear facades are simpler, with fewer and smaller windows, and the rear wall is entirely solid brick. The house has a modern, minimalist design with clean lines and a focus on geometric forms.
description: A modern two-story brick house with a flat green roof, large horizontal windows, and a bold geometric driveway or patio in front.
description_view_0: Front view showing large horizontal windows, a central entryway, and a striking black-and-white patterned driveway or patio.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing a secondary entry, a long window, and the continuation of the geometric ground pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid brick wall with no windows or doors, and the flat green roof.
description_view_3: Right side view with a blue entry door, a small black window, and the geometric ground pattern extending from the front.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large horizontal windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a covered porch or carport, flanked by large windows and supported by slender columns
